channel.title: Posts on Philipp Schmalen
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Philipp Schmalen

item.title: Causal Forest for Heterogeneity Analyses
item.description: A step-by-step guide for practitioners Estimate conditional average treatment effects (CATE) with causal forest by Athey et al. (2019)[1]. With emphasis on replicability and consistent models parameter tuning out-of-bag prediction visualized heterogeneity To be published January 2020. References [1] Athey, S., Tibshirani, J., & Wager, S. (2019). Generalized random forests. The Annals of Statistics, 47(2), 1148-1178.
